allow: Bash(curl -s "https://api.github.com/repos/spMohanty/PlantVillage-Dataset/contents/raw/color" | python3 -c "import json,sys; data=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(d['name']\) for d in data if d['type']=='dir']" | head -50)

Bash(curl -s "https://api.github.com/repos/spMohanty/PlantVillage-Dataset/contents/raw/color/Soybean___healthy" | python3 -c "import json,sys; data=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(f'Total files: {len\(data\)}'\); [print\(d['name'], d['download_url'][:80]\) for d in data[:3]]")

Bash(curl -s "https://api.github.com/repos/spMohanty/PlantVillage-Dataset/git/trees/master?recursive=1" | python3 -c "
import json, sys
data = json.load\(sys.stdin\)
soy = [t for t in data['tree'] if 'Soybean' in t.get\('path',''\)]
print\(f'Total soybean entries: {len\(soy\)}'\)
# check if there are folders beyond healthy
folders = set\(\)
for t in soy:
    parts = t['path'].split\('/'\)
    for p in parts:
        if 'Soybean' in p:
            folders.add\(p\)
print\('Folders:', folders\)
" 2>/dev/null || echo "Tree too large")

Bash(curl -sL "https://zenodo.org/api/records/7304859" | python3 -c "
import json, sys
data = json.load\(sys.stdin\)
files = data.get\('files', []\)
for f in files:
    size_mb = f['size'] / \(1024*1024\)
    print\(f'{f[\\"key\\"]:40s} {size_mb:8.1f} MB  {f[\\"links\\"][\\"self\\"]}'\)
print\(f'\\nTotal files: {len\(files\)}'\)
total = sum\(f['size'] for f in files\)
print\(f'Total size: {total/\(1024**3\):.1f} GB'\)
")
